title: Artifex: The Art of Combat
description: Expands Minecraft's combat system with a wide arsenal of 114 weapons spanning 21 distinct weapon types.
body: ![AF](https://github.com/AquexTheSeal/Artifex/blob/master/modpage/banner.png?raw=true) ![1](https://github.com/AquexTheSeal/Artifex/blob/master/modpage/1.png?raw=true) Artifex expands Minecraft's combat system with a wide arsenal of 120+ weapons spanning 23 distinct weapon types. Every weapon features unique stats, attack speeds, reach distances, and powerful Weapon Specialties with special mechanics that define your combat style. ![2](https://github.com/AquexTheSeal/Artifex/blob/master/modpage/2-2.png?raw=true) Available weapon types include the Knuckles, Shortsword, Sickle, Katana, Battleaxe, Flanged Mace, Glaive, Halberd, Scythe, Greatsword, Odachi, Rapier, Scimitar, Bow, Longbow, Crossbow, Arbalest, Dagger, Javelin, Spear, Buckler, Shield, and War Door. ![3](https://github.com/AquexTheSeal/Artifex/blob/master/modpage/3.png?raw=true) Combat mods like Better Combat is recommended! **Mod compatibility addons for this mod are currently in the works.**
